hero.title: Learning Resources
hero.subtitle: Tools to extend the DreamDo experience at home and in the classroom.

intro: Our learning kits and parent resources are designed to keep young learners engaged between sessions and give parents the tools to continue the conversation at home.

items.name: Little Farmers Activity Kit
items.description: A complete hands-on kit with seed packets, a mini planting journal, and illustrated guide for children aged 6–10.

items.name: AI Explorers Workbook
items.description: Step-by-step coding activities and AI challenges for ages 10–14. No screen required — pairs with the online sessions.

items.name: Young Entrepreneur Starter Guide
items.description: A practical business-planning workbook walking young people through ideation, market research, and their first pitch.

items.name: Parent's Guide to Future-Ready Kids
items.description: How to support your child's growth at home between DreamDo sessions. Conversation prompts, activities, and milestone trackers included.

items.name: DreamDo Starter Backpack
items.description: Durable backpack branded with the DreamDo logo. Perfect for workshops, field days, and school.

items.name: DreamDo Water Bottle
items.description: Stainless steel water bottle. Carry your dreams everywhere.

note: All prices in Kenyan Shillings (KES). For bulk school orders, contact us for pricing.
